# ORDO

> A measured, honest context-engineering framework for LLMs: a terse command grammar + an output-
> discipline contract + quality/autonomy gates. Runtime (decode/format/inbound) + a paste-in spec.
> No magic claims; an honest scorecard ships with it (GPT-tokenizer proxies; re-validate on your model).

## Start here
- [OPERATING-PROFILE.md](OPERATING-PROFILE.md): the whole framework on one page (paste into a system prompt).
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an AI agent activates and uses ORDO.
- [README.md](README.md): install, the honest scorecard, runtime-vs-methodology.
- [ORDO.md](ORDO.md): the language skillstone (teach an LLM ORDO-G in one paste).

## Runtime (executable)
- src/index.js: decode(), emit()/bestFormat(), compressInbound(), ponytailFlags(), getSpec().
- `npm install ordo-llm` ; `npx ordo decode "σ文3列简"` ; `npm test` (11/11).

## Methodology (prompt SOPs — text, not code)
- spec/framework.md (REFEED loop), spec/experimentalist-gate.md, spec/evaluation-gate.md,
  spec/autonomy.md, spec/context-rot.md, spec/orchestration.md.

## Evidence
- BENCHMARKS.md (computed vs agent-judged, with reproduce commands).
- VERDICT.md (every measured number + the cut list).
- docs/SELF-EVAL.md (ORDO scored 6.5/10 by its own evaluation gate — the honest critique).
- DISCLAIMERS.md (private-use ethics; not for evading safety/monitoring).
